org.key_project.ui.interactionlog

Class InteractionLogView

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.awt.Component
      • java.awt.Container
        • javax.swing.JComponent
          • javax.swing.JPanel
            • org.key_project.ui.interactionlog.InteractionLogView
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    TabPanel, java.awt.image.ImageObserver, java.awt.MenuContainer, java.io.Serializable, javax.accessibility.Accessible, InteractionRecorderListener

    public class InteractionLogView
extends javax.swing.JPanel
implements InteractionRecorderListener, TabPanel
